caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it sits behind a professional microphone. He is in a room featuring a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To the right, clothing racks are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular one on the left and a red text logo on the right that says "REALLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man speaks and shifts his facial expressions; he begins with a slight smile, looks slightly to the side with a neutral expression, and then returns to speaking while looking forward. The background setting, equipment, and clothing remain constant as only the man's head and facial movements change.
